name: cannibal.live_world_night_local_contact_pack_mcw
description: Scenario 2 for cannibal camp night-raid live matrix: night/darkness plus local contact should promote a cannibal_camp to a multi-member pack attack through the real live dispatch and local-gate path, with no bandit shakedown surface. The fixture reuses the reviewer-visible camp-shaped source footprint, relabels it as cannibal_camp, places it one OMT from the player, and sets the save to a night 30-minute dispatch cadence boundary so one proven pass-turn can exercise dispatch/local-contact instead of relying on fragile long waits.

steps.label: post_load_night_pack_fixture_settle
steps.expected_visible_fact: post-load gameplay screen for McWilliams cannibal night local-contact fixture; this is startup/load evidence plus before-action screen proof, not feature closure by itself
steps.failure_rule: If the gameplay screen is not visible after load, later dispatch/local-contact artifacts cannot be credited.

steps.label: pass_one_turn_on_night_dispatch_boundary
steps.expected_visible_fact: one player pass-turn input has completed on the night local-contact fixture; feature credit depends on the same-run debug artifact showing cannibal_camp posture=attack_now, pack_size=2, darkness_or_concealment=yes, local_contact=yes, shakedown=no, and combat_forward=yes
steps.failure_rule: If the pass-turn input is unproven or the same-run artifact lacks the cannibal attack-now local-gate line, this scenario is not product proof.

evidence_contract.claim: night darkness plus local contact creates confirmed multi-member cannibal pack attack through real dispatch/local-contact
evidence_contract.load_only_verdict: load proof only / inconclusive for cannibal behavior
evidence_contract.failure_rule: No feature-proof credit if startup/load, pass-turn ledger, cannibal site match, night/concealment gate, local contact, pack-size, attack-now posture, non-shakedown artifact, or combat-forward artifact is missing or non-green.
